title: senecio × lamottei
intro: Senecio × lamottei, also known as Lamotte's ragwort, is a hybrid plant of the genus Senecio, native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio × lamottei include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
